# Role: ADMIN_OPERATIONS

## Purpose

Daily operations role for catalog, orders, and user support management.

## Permissions

- Manage products, stock, and category data
- Manage orders and delivery assignment operations
- Create USER, DELIVERY_STAFF, SUPPORT_STAFF accounts
- Access operational dashboards and issue resolution tools

## Restrictions

- Cannot create SUPER_ADMIN
- Cannot bypass payment verification or refund integrity checks
- Should not access secrets or platform-wide security configuration
